## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (non-breaking change correcting an issue)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor (code improvement without functional changes)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking Change (fix or feature that requires existing code to change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation (updates to README or comments)

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. 
     Include instructions so a reviewer can reproduce. -->
- [ ] **Unit Tests:** Ran `dotnet test` in `tests/VEGG.TABLE.UnitTests`.
- [ ] **Manual Verification:** (e.g., "Tested the 'Move' command in the Console app with input 'LMRM'").

## ✅ Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's `.editorconfig` style guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the **README.md**.
- [ ] My changes generate no new build warnings.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
